title: Advanced Enchanting Table
description: Upgrade your enchanting experience with a simpler and better enchanting table!
body:
This Mod Introduces The Brand-New Advanced Enchanting Table, Offering A Unique Enchanting Experience In Minecraft! It Also Adds The Redstone Shard, A New Item That Replaces Lapis Lazuli As The Catalyst In This Enchanting System.

The Table Provides Three Enchanting Level Options, Each With Specific XP Requirements And Costs:

Level 1: Requires At Least 5 XP Levels And Consumes 1 Level Upon Use.
Level 2: Requires At Least 15 XP Levels And Consumes 2 Levels Upon Use.
Level 3: Requires At Least 30 XP Levels And Consumes 3 Levels Upon Use.
